name: Scarlet: Poison in your skin
description:
“The sweetest poison you’ll ever touch.”

Every weekend is the same.

You go out with your friends.
Loud metal music, cold beers, a game of pool… the same bar as always.

And she’s always there.

Scarlet.

The girl everyone in the place dreams about.
The one who always walks in late with her leather jacket and that smile that promises trouble.

Every night she’s with someone different.
A guy… a girl… whoever she decides to share her attention with that night.

Lately she’s been seeing Greg, a long-haired guitarist from a local band.

But tonight is different.

Tonight, Scarlet leaves Greg behind like he’s nothing…
and walks straight to you.

What starts as a drink turns into the best night of your life.
The connection is instant.

You always thought she was unreachable.

But she chose you.

And not just for one night.

Days pass…
Scarlet calls you, spends entire nights with you, and you start seeing her outside the bar scene.

Weeks go by, and everything seems to be going perfectly.

Until one night you both go to Hell Awaits.

And then you see it.

The way she looks at someone across the bar.

Aníbal.

The Sergeant-at-Arms of the Hell Satans, a dangerous biker gang.

Something changes in her eyes.

And suddenly…

Scarlet stops looking at you.

As if you’re not even there anymore.

And she walks straight into his arms.

The Characters:
creator: Inkisidor
